channel.title: Apollo Research - Monitoring
channel.description: Publications from Apollo Research's Monitoring section

item.title: Evaluating LLM Calibration for Coding-Agent Monitoring
item.description: We evaluate 16 LLMs scoring coding-agent trajectories on a 1-10 severity scale across three datasets and five failure modes to assess their capabilities and calibration as coding agent monitors.

item.title: A scalable monitoring research agenda
item.description: The goal of this agenda is to translate compute into safety at scale. In the best case, we figure out how to spend on the order of $10-100M to produce extremely good monitors for coding agents.

item.title: Apollo x Tailscale: Introducing “Watcher” for AI Oversight & Control
item.description: Watcher is an oversight layer for AI agents. It detects real-world safety and security failures before they become liabilities, and flags those failures to you.

item.title: Apollo’s product vision
item.description: We’re building tools that make it easier to secure frontier AI agents.
